text.title: GitHub Actions — Deployment Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Junior dev triggers prod deploy from a feature branch.
antipattern.fix: Add required approvers + branch filter to the prod environment.

antipattern.symptom: Five repos copy-paste the same 200-line deploy YAML; one bug fixed in 4, missed in 1.
antipattern.fix: Extract to org/cd-library and reference by version tag.

antipattern.symptom: Bad version replaces healthy fleet; outage 22 min.
antipattern.fix: Adopt canary with rollback metric gate.

antipattern.symptom: Release notes drift; release missed in announcement.
antipattern.fix: Wire release-drafter + automated tag + GitHub Release.
